request_payload.exposure_text: As a retired civil defense coordinator, I've seen firsthand how vital preparedness is for national security. The recent drills in our community showed that even basic training can make a huge difference. We can't afford to cut funding for these programs—especially with rising threats. #CivilDefenseMatters #NationalSecurityFirst
